degree_requirements_summary.degree_type: Master of Science at Iowa State University

ms_thesis.name: Human Computer Interaction, M.S. Thesis
ms_thesis.supervision: HCI faculty member must serve as major professor.
ms_thesis.funding: Major professor usually provides funding for a half-time graduate assistantship.

core_courses.description: Any four courses, one from each category: Design, Implementation, Phenomena, Evaluation.

general_electives.description: Any courses from the ISU Course Catalog.

additional_requirements.course: GR ST 565 Responsible Conduct of Research (1 credit)
additional_requirements.applicability: Required for students entering Spring 2022 and after. Encouraged for current students.

ms_creative_component.name: Human Computer Interaction, M.S. Creative Component (capstone project)
ms_creative_component.supervision: Students do not need an HCI faculty member as major professor.
ms_creative_component.funding: Assistantship funding is unavailable. Students responsible for tuition and fees.

core_courses.description: Any four courses, one from each category: Design, Implementation, Phenomena, Evaluation.

general_electives.description: Any 5000 or 6000-level courses from ISU Course Catalog, including additional HCI courses.

additional_requirements.requirement: Feedback data from at least 5 users (interview, survey, or observation).
additional_requirements.applicability: Students completing creative component in Spring 2023 and after.
additional_requirements.appeal_process: Appeal to DOGE if 5 users not achieved.

research_differences.title: Differences between the research for HCI master's degrees

irb_requirement.not_required_if: Only code or system building is involved

output.description: Document explains in detail what was done

irb_requirement.not_required_if: Only code or system building is involved

output.description: Website and docs explain the project

irb_requirement.required_if: You want to publish the work
irb_requirement.not_required_if: Project is not intended for publication
